assertions.description: The bus_analysis reports 4 SPI buses for a single-IC (U1) design that has two physical SPI interfaces (SCK/MOSI/MISO and vSCK/vMOSI/vMISO). Each physical bus is detected twice: bus_id '0' and 'pin_J0' both reference the SCK/MOSI/MISO nets, and bus_id 'V' and 'pin_M1' both reference vSCK/vMOSI/vMISO. This appears to be a deduplication bug where the same signal group is matched from different starting anchor points.
